sprints.name: COMPILATION FIX & INTEGRATION
sprints.description: Critical sprint to fix all compilation errors and ensure all tests pass. No new features - focus on making existing code compile and work together.

tasks.title: Fix Core Module Compilation Errors
tasks.description: Resolve all compilation errors in src-tauri/src/core/. Fix type mismatches, missing imports, and visibility issues. Ensure proper re-exports in mod.rs.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build --bin src-tauri succeeds with zero errors
All 56+ tests in core module pass with cargo test core::
mod.rs properly re-exports AntennaGeometry, SimulationResult, SParameters, and all public types

tasks.title: Implement Tauri Command Bridge
tasks.description: Add Tauri commands for frontend integration: simulate_antenna, get_antenna_templates, export_touchstone. Ensure proper error handling and serialization.
acceptance_criteria: simulate_antenna command accepts antenna parameters and returns S-parameters
get_antenna_templates returns list of available antenna types
export_touchstone saves .s1p/.s2p files to user-specified path
All commands handle errors gracefully with proper Result<T, String> returns

tasks.title: Remove GPU Dependencies - CPU Parallel Implementation
tasks.description: Remove all wgpu runtime calls and implement CPU-only parallel computation using rayon. Replace GPU compute shaders with parallel CPU algorithms.
acceptance_criteria: All wgpu imports and dependencies removed from Cargo.toml
parallel_impedance_fill implemented using rayon::par_iter
parallel_frequency_sweep processes frequency points in parallel
cargo build succeeds without GPU runtime dependencies
cargo test gpu:: passes all tests

tasks.title: Fix UI Component TypeScript Errors
tasks.description: Resolve all TypeScript compilation errors in UI components. Fix type imports, prop interfaces, and hook usage.
acceptance_criteria: tsc --noEmit passes with zero TypeScript errors
All component prop interfaces properly defined
React hooks used correctly with proper dependency arrays
No 'any' types - all components fully typed

tasks.title: Create Main App Layout Integration
tasks.description: Build main App.tsx that integrates all existing components with proper layout. Sidebar navigation, main content area, 3D viewport placeholder.
acceptance_criteria: App.tsx renders without runtime errors
Sidebar contains navigation for Antenna Design, Simulation, Analysis tabs
Main content area switches between AntennaForm, SimulationHistory, ComparisonPanel
Dark theme applied consistently using Tailwind classes
3D viewport placeholder reserves space for antenna visualization

tasks.title: Fix 3D Viewport TypeScript Compilation
tasks.description: Resolve TypeScript errors in all viewport components and antenna models. Ensure proper Three.js type usage.
acceptance_criteria: tsc --noEmit passes for all files in src/viewport/
DipoleModel, MonopoleModel, PatchModel, QfhModel compile without errors
Three.js types properly imported and used
vitest runs successfully on viewport tests

tasks.title: Create Unified AntennaViewport Component
tasks.description: Build single AntennaViewport component that switches between antenna models based on type. Integrate with UI layout.
acceptance_criteria: AntennaViewport accepts antenna type prop and renders appropriate model
Smooth transitions between different antenna visualizations
Component integrates with main App layout without layout shifts
Viewport responds to window resize events properly

tasks.title: Fix Python Test Suite
tasks.description: Resolve all failing Python tests. Fix import errors, missing dependencies, and test assertion failures.
acceptance_criteria: pytest runs without import errors
All existing tests pass with 100% success rate
Test coverage reports generated successfully
No deprecated API usage warnings

tasks.title: Add ONNX Export and Training CLI
tasks.description: Implement ONNX model export functionality and create CLI script for model training.
acceptance_criteria: Surrogate model exports to .onnx format successfully
CLI script: python -m antenna_ml.train --data data.jsonl --output model.onnx works
Training script validates input data format
Exported ONNX model loads and runs inference correctly

tasks.title: Integration Testing and Build Verification
tasks.description: Run full build pipeline and integration tests to ensure all components work together.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build completes successfully
npm run build produces working Tauri application
pytest passes all Python tests
Integration test: create dipole → simulate → display results works end-to-end
Application launches without runtime errors

sprints.name: STABILITY & PERFORMANCE
sprints.description: Improve application stability, add error handling, and optimize performance after compilation fixes.

tasks.title: Add Comprehensive Error Handling
tasks.description: Implement robust error handling throughout core simulation engine with proper error propagation to UI.
acceptance_criteria: All simulation errors display user-friendly messages in UI
Invalid antenna parameters rejected with specific error descriptions
File I/O errors handled gracefully with retry mechanisms
Error logging implemented for debugging

tasks.title: Optimize Parallel CPU Performance
tasks.description: Profile and optimize rayon-based parallel computation for maximum CPU utilization.
acceptance_criteria: Impedance matrix computation utilizes all available CPU cores
Memory usage optimized to prevent allocation bottlenecks
Frequency sweep completes 50% faster than serial implementation
Performance benchmarks documented

tasks.title: Add Loading States and Progress Indicators
tasks.description: Implement loading spinners, progress bars, and status indicators for long-running operations.
acceptance_criteria: Simulation progress bar shows completion percentage
Loading spinners appear during file operations
Status messages inform user of current operation
Cancel button allows stopping long simulations

tasks.title: Optimize 3D Rendering Performance
tasks.description: Improve viewport rendering performance and add level-of-detail for complex geometries.
acceptance_criteria: Viewport maintains 60fps during camera movement
Level-of-detail reduces geometry complexity at distance
Memory usage stays below 100MB for typical antenna models
Smooth animations for parameter changes

tasks.title: Model Validation and Accuracy Metrics
tasks.description: Add validation pipeline for surrogate models with accuracy reporting.
acceptance_criteria: Cross-validation reports R² score > 0.95 for S-parameters
Model accuracy compared against MoM ground truth
Validation metrics exported to JSON report
Automated model quality checks before deployment

sprints.name: USER EXPERIENCE POLISH
sprints.description: Polish user interface, add keyboard shortcuts, improve workflows, and enhance usability.

tasks.title: Implement Keyboard Shortcuts and Hotkeys
tasks.description: Add keyboard shortcuts for common operations and power user workflows.
acceptance_criteria: Ctrl+S saves current project
Ctrl+R runs simulation
Ctrl+E exports results
F11 toggles fullscreen 3D viewport
Help dialog (F1) shows all available shortcuts

tasks.title: Add Undo/Redo for Parameter Changes
tasks.description: Implement undo/redo stack for antenna parameter modifications.
acceptance_criteria: Ctrl+Z undoes last parameter change
Ctrl+Y redoes undone changes
Undo stack maintains 50 recent changes
Visual indicator shows when undo/redo available

tasks.title: Add Interactive 3D Controls
tasks.description: Implement mouse controls for 3D viewport: orbit, pan, zoom, and selection.
acceptance_criteria: Left mouse drag orbits camera around antenna
Right mouse drag pans viewport
Mouse wheel zooms in/out smoothly
Double-click resets camera to default view
Viewport controls help overlay (H key)

tasks.title: Add Project Save/Load Functionality
tasks.description: Implement project file format for saving/loading complete antenna designs and results.
acceptance_criteria: Save project as .promin file with antenna params + simulation results
Load project restores all parameters and displays previous results
Auto-save every 5 minutes to prevent data loss
Recent projects list in File menu

tasks.title: Add Model Performance Monitoring
tasks.description: Implement runtime monitoring of surrogate model performance and accuracy.
acceptance_criteria: Real-time comparison of AI predictions vs MoM results
Accuracy metrics displayed in UI dashboard
Model confidence intervals shown with predictions
Automatic fallback to MoM when AI confidence low

sprints.name: ADVANCED FEATURES & OPTIMIZATION
sprints.description: Add advanced simulation features, optimization algorithms, and professional reporting capabilities.

tasks.title: Implement Multi-Port S-Parameter Analysis
tasks.description: Extend simulation engine to handle multi-port antennas and full S-parameter matrices.
acceptance_criteria: Support for 2-port, 4-port antenna analysis
Full S-parameter matrix calculation (S11, S12, S21, S22)
Multi-port Touchstone file export (.s2p, .s4p)
Isolation and coupling analysis between ports

tasks.title: Implement Genetic Algorithm Optimization
tasks.description: Add genetic algorithm for automated antenna parameter optimization using AI surrogate models.
acceptance_criteria: GA optimizes antenna parameters for target S11 < -20dB
Population size and mutation rate configurable
Optimization progress visualized in real-time
Pareto front analysis for multi-objective optimization

tasks.title: Add Professional Reporting System
tasks.description: Create comprehensive PDF report generation with charts, tables, and analysis.
acceptance_criteria: PDF report includes antenna geometry, S-parameters, Smith chart
Customizable report templates for different use cases
Export to multiple formats: PDF, HTML, Word
Company logo and branding customization

tasks.title: Add Radiation Pattern Visualization
tasks.description: Implement 3D radiation pattern visualization with far-field calculations.
acceptance_criteria: 3D radiation pattern overlay on antenna geometry
Polar plot view for 2D pattern cuts
Gain, directivity, and efficiency calculations
Animation of pattern vs frequency

tasks.title: Add Parallel Frequency Sweep Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize frequency sweep calculations using advanced parallel algorithms.
acceptance_criteria: Frequency points processed in optimal batch sizes
Memory-efficient streaming for large frequency ranges
Adaptive frequency sampling based on S-parameter variation
50% reduction in simulation time for broadband analysis

sprints.name: PRODUCTION READINESS
sprints.description: Final polish, comprehensive testing, documentation, and deployment preparation for production release.

tasks.title: Comprehensive Integration Testing
tasks.description: Create full end-to-end test suite covering all major user workflows and edge cases.
acceptance_criteria: Automated tests for all antenna types and simulation scenarios
Performance regression tests with benchmarks
Error handling tests for invalid inputs and edge cases
Cross-platform testing on Windows, macOS, Linux

tasks.title: Create User Documentation and Tutorials
tasks.description: Develop comprehensive user guide, tutorials, and help system.
acceptance_criteria: Step-by-step tutorial for first antenna simulation
Complete user manual with screenshots
In-app help system with contextual tips
Video tutorials for advanced features

tasks.title: Final UI/UX Polish and Accessibility
tasks.description: Final polish pass on user interface with accessibility improvements.
acceptance_criteria: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for accessibility
High contrast mode for visually impaired users
Keyboard navigation for all UI elements
Screen reader compatibility

tasks.title: Model Deployment and Version Management
tasks.description: Implement system for deploying and managing different versions of AI models.
acceptance_criteria: Model versioning system with backward compatibility
Automatic model updates with user consent
Model performance monitoring in production
Rollback capability for problematic model versions

tasks.title: Performance Optimization and Profiling
tasks.description: Final performance optimization pass with detailed profiling and benchmarking.
acceptance_criteria: Detailed performance profiles for all major operations
Memory usage optimized to minimum required
Startup time under 3 seconds on typical hardware
Simulation performance benchmarks documented

tasks.title: Release Preparation and Deployment
tasks.description: Prepare final release build with installer, code signing, and distribution setup.
acceptance_criteria: Signed installers for Windows, macOS, Linux
Automatic update system implemented
Crash reporting and telemetry system
Production deployment pipeline ready

shared_interfaces_needed: AntennaGeometry trait with unified parameter interface
SimulationResult struct with S-parameters and metadata
Tauri command interface for frontend-backend communication
ONNX model interface for AI surrogate integration
Error handling types and propagation patterns
